task_completion.description: Create the root profile ellipse with 20mm major and 6mm minor radius.
task_completion.visual_evidence: FreeCAD sketcher or tree view showing an ellipse at the origin with dimensions/constraints for 20mm (major) and 6mm (minor) radii.

task_completion.description: Create the tip profile ellipse at Z=100 with 12mm major and 3mm minor radius.
task_completion.visual_evidence: FreeCAD sketcher or tree view showing a second ellipse offset in the Z-axis (height 100mm) with dimensions/constraints for 12mm (major) and 3mm (minor) radii.

task_completion.description: Rotate the tip profile 45 degrees counter-clockwise around the Z-axis.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The tip ellipse appears rotated by 45 degrees relative to the root ellipse in the 3D view, or the properties panel shows a 45-degree rotation/placement angle for the tip sketch.

task_completion.description: Create a solid twisted turbine blade by lofting between the root and tip profiles.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 3D solid twisted blade is visible in the viewport connecting the two ellipses. The FreeCAD tree view should display a 'Loft' or 'AdditiveLoft' feature.

task_completion.description: Save the model as turbine_blade.FCStd in the specified directory.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The FreeCAD window title bar displays 'turbine_blade.FCStd' or a file explorer shows the file saved in /home/ga/Documents/FreeCAD/.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the FreeCAD GUI to construct the model.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the FreeCAD interface (toolbars, 3D viewport, combo view) being actively used, rather than just terminal commands.

integrity.description: The model was built using native FreeCAD features rather than importing a pre-made file.
integrity.visual_evidence: The Tree View shows the construction history (e.g., Sketches, Loft) instead of a single imported solid or mesh.

integrity.description: The 3D model is genuinely rendered in the application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The twisted turbine blade is clearly visible in the FreeCAD 3D viewport, confirming it is not just a dummy file creation.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Verified facts: Expected filename is 'turbine_blade.FCStd'. The model height must be exactly 100.0 mm (from Z=0 to Z=100). The tip profile is rotated 45 degrees, creating a visible twist with a maximum Y-width of approximately 17.49 mm at the tip (threshold > 14.0 mm for twist detection).
